added_sugar_high: {added_sugar_g}g added sugar per serving. For cutting, aim for ≤{max_added_sugar}g.
added_sugar_moderate: {added_sugar_g}g sugar — acceptable occasionally, not daily for cutting.
protein_low: {protein_g}g protein — below target. Aim for ≥{min_protein}g per serving.
protein_moderate: {protein_g}g protein — OK but not optimal for cutting.
calories_high: {calories} calories — calorie-dense for a cutting snack.
calories_moderate: {calories} cal — fine if it fits your daily budget.
protein_efficiency_low: Low protein per calorie ({protein_per_100_cal}g per 100 cal).
data_incomplete: Nutrition data incomplete — verdict is low confidence.
